DID."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"createDid(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,bytes32)":{"details":"Creates a new Decentralized Identifier (DID) using the specified method identifiers and a random value. The method identifiers can be optionally provided, and if any of them is not provided (i.e., set to 0), the default method identifier will be used instead.","params":{"method0":"The first method identifier.","method1":"The second method identifier.","method2":"The third method identifier.","random":"A random value used to generate the DID. You can use uuidv4() to generate a random value, for example. Requirements: - The random value must not be zero. - The generated DID must not already exist. Emits a `DidCreated` event with the generated DID and the address of the caller."}}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/DidManager.sol":"DidManager"},"evmVersion":"london","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/DidManager.sol":{"keccak256":"0x59feb12ef942ff9e901ded851104a25f35779c1b49e4489ffca4322ffa9e3c43","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://75c3f6f39d9160d2cb4d58833825683087748c779eb38c3cfae03c021c14adde","dweb:/ipfs/QmZYW7Gxb1yBr9u916Ggd1Yhx146uH7xe4u9qLSZRsjSNA"]},"contracts/interfaces/IDidManager.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6060ec83dc662686e9653b409f8bdc5c0b6314dc6a9951ffd39b0f1594b1089f","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://d576e11c7f1238f92d545aff00c95a812a4914ce3a1ade7cf5b10c8a95eeaf29","dweb:/ipfs/QmPyJk77LzWrrKkkBS4VeQJ1gZGZhdyE1J1w7fi2PsoJzS"]},"contracts/interfaces/IServiceStorage.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb3b7d06926a2dc8947c3982ba31757433064a5167f9cda5d9eb6b7517f83937c","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://74544f359387a762632189a220415ac3d2cd716c0de5446299923ff3121f2506","dweb:/ipfs/Qmc5xK6EbzpgiHka7uVWYd2RbtWXFGToLqd6E9mAxAVLiM"]},"contracts/interfaces/IVMStorage.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1fb683c01435127bbd5fd01e48f85a969e7bdaa556985caec058ef1ec6daf58a","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://794f03c7f1068516b2b321585bdab2ff314e91c5667ced9b2e2859cc3ff49325","dweb:/ipfs/QmXzKt6R62tybM9ibPqF3UPNFzbmupy8f5zxM8QEEtbvu5"]}},"version":1}
